design_rationale: Citizens need trust, clarity, and approachability. A light theme with organic, earthy tones prevents the platform from feeling like a cold corporate tool or an intimidating government portal. The design prioritizes high contrast for elderly accessibility and a gamified, optimistic visual tone.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-stone-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-stone-900

spacing_and_layout.general_philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers with borders must use p-6 or p-8 internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Asymmetrical spans. Hero: col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, utilized pixels. Primary charts span 2-3 columns.

surfaces.header: Solid Background (bg-white) with a hard bottom border (border-stone-200). z-50 sticky.
surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-stone-200), no shadow by default. Hover: shadow-md -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200.
surfaces.buttons: Flat, sharp padding (px-6 py-3). Primary buttons use #166534 (Deep Forest Green) bg and white text. Hover state explicitly defined.

interactions.hover_states: Must explicitly set text color on hover. e.g., hover:bg-stone-100 hover:text-stone-900
interactions.focus_states: High contrast ring. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none
interactions.animations: Subtle, reduced motion supported. transition-all duration-200 ease-out.

components.forms: Shadcn/UI heavily customized with Work Sans body and generous p-4 inputs.
components.map: Leaflet.js integrated inside a Shadcn Card. No full-bleed map to avoid scroll-trapping.
components.voice_reporting: Prominent floating action button or large inline block with a microphone icon, pulsing animation when active.
components.gamification: Phosphor Icons (Duotone) combined with accent colors for badges (Gold/Amber, Silver/Stone, Bronze/Terracotta).
components.multi_language: Shadcn DropdownMenu in the top right nav.

hero_illustration.description: Wide-angle vector illustration of a clean, modern eco-friendly city. Used for Citizen Portal Landing Page.

pothole_example_1.description: Empty street lit by streetlights at night, showing road conditions.

pothole_example_2.description: Body of water on road (pothole issue).

community_happy.description: Three friends laughing together outdoors. Used for gamification/success states.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links). Format: kebab-case, role-based.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA minimums. No low-contrast grey-on-grey.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the marketing landing page (no Shadcn containers, raw divs for asymmetry).
Use Shadcn components for the citizen portal and municipal dashboard (Forms, Tables, Tabs, Select).
Integrate Leaflet.js (`react-leaflet`) for the map interface. Ensure the map tiles load smoothly and pins use the defined accent colors.
Implement Google Login and JWT standard forms.
For the voice reporting, use a clear visual indicator (e.g., a pulsating microphone icon).
Multi-language selector should be globally available in the header.
Do not use generic placeholder text or dummy images. Use the provided Unsplash and generated image URLs.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to every form submission button, nav link, and issue card.
